prose:
The Fukui reactivity indices for ferrocene were calculated using the GFN2-xTB method.

**Fukui Reactivity Indices** — GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding method, xtb), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided by user at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`; this was a single-point calculation on the given geometry. SCF converged.
The most electrophilic site is the Iron (Fe) atom (index 10, 0-based) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.22885456.
The most nucleophilic site is also the Iron (Fe) atom (index 10, 0-based) with a Fukui f- index of 0.25938191.
